description: Batch entry extraction. Java: @Scheduled(cron=..) yields a scheduled entry per annotation (repeated @Scheduled counted separately); public static void main yields a main entry. XML: Spring CronTriggerFactoryBean beans (including nested ones inside a SchedulerFactoryBean list) yield quartz entries with the referenced jobDetail bean id as handler and cron=<cronExpression>; the MethodInvokingJobDetailFactoryBean JobDetail bean is excluded to avoid double counting. <task:scheduled> yields a task-xml entry with ref#method handler and cron=<cron>.
